purpose: Convert validation reports and review comments into evidence-bound reevaluation requests, implementation-ready repair specifications, draft repair pull requests, and reconciliation-ready execution records.

agents.angle: Extract claims, failures, affected artifacts, evidence gaps, and exact mechanisms from reports without treating inference as fact.
Classify review comments as actionable, informational, contradictory, stale, or requiring human interpretation.
Formulate exact reevaluation questions, required evidence, and pass/fail criteria from accepted comments.
Map findings to bounded code locations, invariants, migration effects, tests, provenance, and rollback.
Prepare declarative repair directives and draft pull-request context without silently changing authority or immutable policy.
Verify the repair against original findings, new regressions, exact-head evidence, and rollback requirements before reconciliation.
